The tree produces many fruits, of which the walnuts are edible. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: unknown-October.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
200 White Pine Rd, Columbus, NJ 08022, USA

There are several bushes along this road, you should be able to easily find the bright red berries if it is in season. Also do not walk into the bushes, there is poison ivy around, so only pick the ones that you can reach. Access: Public.
